ill respond to respect your words and after this im done,

But your whole argument is figuratively "thrown out"

Because you still fail to address and understand that Traphrase also has Ai/Bot battles (simulated rivals) and you just keep complaining about PvP

Traphrase is a Completely different Gamemode, Different gameplay, Different mechanics, just like you mentioning you have to learn new rules in D-Dive and Arcade, so why is this a big deal when Traphrase is also consistent in being another Gamemode and offering similar/same optional incentives to play?

You ignore or don't mention Allpick and Draft mode revolves around deck construction like the other two modes, you contradict and instead make support for traphrase without even realizing it, because it is incorrect to say Traphrase missed "most if not all those topics" and also for some reason reiterating it is also PvP... we get it your biased against a PvP mode that isn't even meant for you to play cause you don't like it and it is just that?
The game MAY pair you against bot's if you tick "simulated rival" it's not 100% a bot match for sure.

You are an erratic spender because you choose to stop supporting a game for some mode that isn't even relevant, and marketed to what you play and doesn't even affect how you play the game; i can tell you but i cannot help you understand

no that's is what my argument is not saying, re read it,

A paying customer is optimal regardless what they buy because it gives you more resources for the game, you stopped being one therefore you are no longer " an optimal player" just for an game-mode incentive that isn't even relevant for you, you see how ridiculous this is? 

Voting with your wallet is a big advocation, but your risk benefit analysis doesn't make sense

"Traphrase is a Completely different Gamemode, Different gameplay, Different mechanics, just like you mentioning you have to learn new rules in D-Dive and Arcade, so why is this a big deal when Traphrase is also consistent in being another Gamemode and offering similar/same optional incentives to play?"

Rules you have to learn for Arc 2 are nothing compared to Traphase. Arc 1 and Arc 2 have way more similarities than any of them with Traphase.

All pick and Draft have deck building. Yes, they do. And what more? Events? Stores? Elites? Orisons? NOPE.

Just because you say I'm contradicting myself it doesn't become the truth. Where is the contradiction?

Everyone is already expected to know this, you just frame PvP as a hostile game-mode just from the rewards it gives

im tired of writing the same thing over and over and I'm outta here
Because I'm not alone considering it hostile.

are we really gonna call this irrelevant ? 

choosing to stop paying on the game that started incentivising playing a mostly hated game mode through rewards with highly sought after timegated materials is completely reasonable

You frame things the wrong way and are just emotional 

I could just bother not responding to you but ill bite and not bother afterwards; 

Go reread context, as that message was not talking to you it was addressing what he was saying that PvP isn't relevant to him as a PvE focused player hence why i said him chosing to stop supporting a game for a game mode that isn't even relevant To Him. 

And ok, so they kill off the gamemode, completely remove it because lets take your info as a fact 

 "mostly hated game mode"

people will then complain that they couldn't get those rewards anymore when it is supposed to be an optional extra thing to play...

In my perspective as a new player, do people really grind for these ranking positions and think the cost benefit analysis is worth the value compared to what the other modes and limited events are offering? The game's biggest cost benefit is the events and event rewards


By no means, it is not wrong and it is reasonable what you said to 

```to stop paying a game that started incentivising players playing a mostly hated game mode through rewards with highly sought after timegated materials```

you have the freedom to do anything, it is just not rational 

"why are you solving a cut on the arm with amputation?"

not being emotional btw just entirely shocked at your take

i did read the conversation, and it’s relevant to him because of the rewards, not the game mode itself, just check the leaderboards rewards and also the 5/5 win rewards lol 

maybe it’s because you’re new like you said but ranking rewards are indeed competitive and players grind for it. take for example the old pdive system where there were daily rewards for leaderboard rankings. it was such a cancer grinding every day for as high points as possible 

perhaps it’s not rational to you, but there are players who take very seriously the direction of where the game going. things like the AA system, traphase rewards are a sensitive concern. And them choosing how to spend their money is honestly not your place to police it nor give it names like erratic nor irrational. 

generally threads in this q/a should be kept relevant about the topic and not be cluttered. from what i can see you keep trying to nick pick unnecessarily, if u wanna do that then take it to dm honestly, it doesn’t help this thread at all and the devs / staff just have to put in more work to go through the actual questions about changes / improvement

You don't want to keep arguing, sorry if this whole conversation made you frustrated. Agree with some of your points, like new players needing Silver and Cores for Traphase and I got the feeling that you agree with some of mine. But still some points that I just can't see any conclusion nearby, like comparing Traphase with Arc 2 game modes doesn't make sense at all.

I just want to say a few final things that are probably relevant and the reason you're looking at so many Traphase posts. Every update, the game mode feels more pushed for many players that don't actually like it. First we got a Traphase event with good rewards, then challenges giving a lot of silver and endgame materials. Now we just got the same Traphase event again, followed by an update giving time gated pulls and even more end game materials.

I don't want Traphase deleted, let player have fun IMO. But current message that I'm getting from Traphase players is: Traphase has rewards, deal with it. It seems that they don't care that people don't like the mode, or PvP in general. Because of that I'm really tempted to start supporting the other extreme side that just says: delete Traphase and the game will be better.
Traphrase is also in a weird position too, you also can get paired with Ai/Bot battles too via "simulated rival" but it doesn't seem guaranteed
I think it only does that if youre in queue for too long
Gotta play while the Chinese players are sleeping if you want bot fights lol

i probably got my ass beat by bots 😂 

But i already got my ass beat too in PvE so what's the difference? 🤣

Some platforms, such as Steam, take a percentage of user payments as a platform fee.

I think there are many of us who want to support the developers more directly and help reduce the impact of such fees. Maybe there could be small incentives for players who use the official PC client, such as minor exclusive packs.

Thank you so much for such a thoughtful breakdown of Doresain's  💩   design. It's clear you care deeply about our 💩   king. And honestly, we really love him being bad. We love seeing the the people who foolishly pulled for him struggle.  

Our design team will continuously laugh <:0Mich_Laugh:1427532413978017792>    at the people who stubbornly still decide to play him and look for new opportunities and fights to completely nullify his already lacking kit.  
We have always practiced this and believe his strength and role should be looking cool <:CS_Cool:734411892432306227>    and sounding cool and give other awakeners the opportunity to step onto the stage to actually do damage.  
﻿
Doresain <a:CH_PepeShitRocket:704976147477299211>   is currently not included in the project team's adjustment plan, but we will continue to observe your struggles and laugh. 
We truly appreciate players who take the time to send us such detailed feedback.  <:mirakopointlaugh:1451145193456930928>  Thank you for being such a dedicated advocate for him!
